subcodes.first_line: Upon thee be greetings and praise, and upon thee be glory and splendor, O thou who art created from the essence of fidelity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: علیک التحیه و الثناء و علیک البهاء و علیک السناء یا من خلق من جوهر الوفاء
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @eulogies; reminiscences
